About Me

Structural Design
Meets Digital

Structural BIM Engineer with expertise in reinforced concrete design for large-scale commercial, hospitality, and residential projects across Egypt and Saudi Arabia, working to ACI 318, ECP 203, SBC 301 & SBC 304.

Currently pursuing an M.Sc. in Integrated Engineering Design Management (IEDM) at Cairo University — combining structural practice with BIM automation, data analytics, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.
